text:
Catalonia, nationality and autonomous community of Spain, also known as Comunitat Autònoma de Catalunya, Community of Catalonia, Catalunya, Autonomous Community of Catalonia, ES-CT, Cataluña, Cat., Catalonha. Attributes include: 
- significant event: "1992 Summer Olympics",
 "Catalonia Offensive",
 "Siege of Barcelona",
 "War of the Catalans",
 "Reapers' War",
 "Peninsular War",
 "Treaty of the Pyrenees (point in time: 1659)",
 "Renaixença",
 "Catalan declaration of independence",
 "constitution of Spain"
- location: "Catalan countries"
- has seal, badge, or sigil: "Seal of the Generalitat de Catalunya"
